narrative:
Lincolnview Local Sd (Vanwert) school district has 3,067 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.9 percentage points.
